description: Resolver inconsistencias estruturais: eliminar hardcode CWB/SP, unificar dual status tracks, dar visibilidade a erros do worker, padronizar UI, otimizar queries.

userStories.title: DB Migration — Add status_unificado column
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a new status_unificado column on siso_pedidos so that all lifecycle states live in one field.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260311_status_unificado.sql
ALTER TABLE siso_pedidos ADD COLUMN status_unificado TEXT
ADD CHECK constraint for valid values: pendente, executando, aguardando_compra, aguardando_nf, aguardando_separacao, em_separacao, separado, embalado, cancelado, erro
ADD DEFAULT 'pendente'

Backfill existing rows: status=pendente→pendente, status=executando→executando, status=concluido + status_separacao=aguardando_compra→aguardando_compra, status=concluido + status_separacao=aguardando_nf→aguardando_nf, status=concluido + status_separacao=aguardando_separacao→aguardando_separacao, status=concluido + status_separacao=em_separacao→em_separacao, status=concluido + status_separacao=separado→separado, status=concluido + status_separacao=embalado→embalado, status=cancelado→cancelado, status=erro→erro
CREATE INDEX idx_siso_pedidos_status_unificado ON siso_pedidos(status_unificado)
Old status and status_separacao columns are NOT deleted (kept deprecated)
Apply migration via Supabase MCP tool apply_migration
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the foundation for US-003 through US-008. The backfill handles all combinations of status + status_separacao. For rows where status=concluido but status_separacao is null, default to aguardando_separacao.

userStories.title: Types — Add StatusUnificado and GalpaoEstoque types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the new unified status type and dynamic stock types defined so subsequent stories have type safety.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/types/index.ts, add StatusUnificado type with values: pendente, executando, aguardando_compra, aguardando_nf, aguardando_separacao, em_separacao, separado, embalado, cancelado, erro

Add GalpaoEstoque interface with fields: galpaoId (string), galpaoNome (string), disponivel (number), saldo (number), reservado (number), depositoId (number | null), depositoNome (string | null), localizacao (string | undefined), atende (boolean)
Add statusUnificado field to Pedido interface as optional (statusUnificado?: StatusUnificado) — optional during transition
Keep existing StatusPedido and StatusSeparacao types (not deleted yet)
Keep existing EstoqueItem fields (not changed yet — that comes in US-011)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This only ADDS new types. It does NOT remove or change existing types yet. That comes later when read paths switch over.

userStories.title: Backend dual-write — webhook-processor writes status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want webhook-processor.ts to write status_unificado alongside old fields so new and old columns stay in sync.
acceptanceCriteria: In webhook-processor.ts, every place that writes status or status_separacao to siso_pedidos must ALSO write status_unificado with the corresponding unified value
When processor saves a new pedido with status=pendente, also set status_unificado=pendente
When cancellation sets status=cancelado, also set status_unificado=cancelado
Import StatusUnificado type if needed for type safety
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read webhook-processor.ts carefully to find ALL places where status or status_separacao is written. The processor primarily writes status=pendente for new orders and status=cancelado for cancellations.

userStories.title: Backend dual-write — execution-worker writes status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want execution-worker.ts to write status_unificado alongside old fields.
acceptanceCriteria: In execution-worker.ts, every update to status or status_separacao must ALSO write status_unificado
executando state: status_unificado=executando
concluido + aguardando_nf: status_unificado=aguardando_nf
concluido + aguardando_compra: status_unificado=aguardando_compra
concluido + aguardando_separacao: status_unificado=aguardando_separacao
erro state: status_unificado=erro
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read execution-worker.ts to find ALL places where status or status_separacao is updated. The worker handles propria (NF + stock), transferencia (NF + deduct), and OC (marcadores only) flows.

userStories.title: Backend dual-write — approval route writes status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want /api/pedidos/aprovar to write status_unificado=executando alongside the old status field.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/api/pedidos/aprovar/route.ts, when setting status=executando also set status_unificado=executando
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Simple change — find the update query and add status_unificado to it.

userStories.title: Backend dual-write — separacao APIs write status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all separacao API routes to write status_unificado alongside status_separacao.
acceptanceCriteria: Find ALL API routes under src/app/api/separacao/ that update status_separacao on siso_pedidos
Each update must also set status_unificado to the same value (aguardando_separacao, em_separacao, separado, embalado)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Search for all files in src/app/api/separacao/ that do .update() on siso_pedidos with status_separacao. Each one needs a parallel status_unificado write.

userStories.title: Backend dual-write — compras APIs write status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want compras API routes to write status_unificado alongside status_separacao.
acceptanceCriteria: Find ALL API routes under src/app/api/compras/ that update status_separacao on siso_pedidos
Each update must also set status_unificado to the corresponding value
The compras-release.ts function must also set status_unificado when releasing pedidos
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Search src/app/api/compras/ and src/lib/compras-release.ts for updates to status_separacao on siso_pedidos.

userStories.title: Backend dual-write — NF webhook handler writes status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want nf-webhook-handler.ts to write status_unificado alongside status_separacao.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/lib/nf-webhook-handler.ts, every update to status_separacao must also set status_unificado
When transitioning aguardando_nf → aguardando_separacao: set status_unificado=aguardando_separacao
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read nf-webhook-handler.ts to find all status_separacao writes.

userStories.title: API — /api/pedidos reads status_unificado and returns it
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the pedidos API to return statusUnificado so the frontend can start consuming it.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/api/pedidos/route.ts, add statusUnificado to the response mapping: statusUnificado: p.status_unificado ?? undefined
Accept ?status_unificado= query param as alternative filter (comma-separated)
When status_unificado filter is present, use .in('status_unificado', values) instead of .in('status', values)
Keep existing ?status= filter working for backwards compatibility
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is additive — both old and new filter params work. Frontend will switch to the new param gradually.

userStories.title: API — /api/pedidos returns dynamic stock from siso_pedido_item_estoques
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the pedidos API to return stock data from the normalized table instead of legacy CWB/SP columns.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/api/pedidos/route.ts, after fetching pedido items, also fetch from siso_pedido_item_estoques for all pedido_ids
JOIN siso_pedido_item_estoques with siso_empresas (for empresa name) and siso_empresas.galpao_id with siso_galpoes (for galpao name)
Group stock data by (pedido_id, produto_id, galpao_id) — aggregate: sum disponivel, sum saldo, sum reservado across empresas in same galpao

Add estoquesPorGalpao array to each item in the response, with fields: galpaoId, galpaoNome, disponivel, saldo, reservado, depositoId (first empresa's), depositoNome (first empresa's), localizacao, atende (disponivel >= quantidadePedida)
KEEP legacy estoqueCWB, estoqueSP, cwbAtende, spAtende fields in the response (not removed yet)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: siso_pedido_item_estoques has columns: pedido_id, produto_id, empresa_id, deposito_id, deposito_nome, saldo, reservado, disponivel, localizacao. Join with siso_empresas to get galpao_id, then with siso_galpoes to get galpao nome. Aggregate by galpao.

userStories.title: Types — Add estoquesPorGalpao to EstoqueItem
userStories.description: As a developer, I want EstoqueItem to have the dynamic estoquesPorGalpao array so the frontend can render N galpoes.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/types/index.ts, add estoquesPorGalpao?: GalpaoEstoque[] to EstoqueItem interface
Keep ALL legacy fields (estoqueCWB, estoqueSP, cwbAtende, spAtende, localizacaoCWB, localizacaoSP) — they are NOT removed yet
The field is optional (?) because old API consumers may not have it yet
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Simple additive type change. The field is optional during transition.

userStories.title: Frontend — PedidoCard renders dynamic stock pills
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PedidoCard to render one stock pill per galpao from estoquesPorGalpao instead of hardcoded CWB/SP.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/components/pedido/pedido-card.tsx, when estoquesPorGalpao is available, render one EditableStockPill per galpao (not hardcoded 2)
EditableStockPill receives galpaoId and galpaoNome instead of literal 'CWB'/'SP'
When estoquesPorGalpao is NOT available (legacy data), fall back to existing CWB/SP rendering
Stock pill label shows the actual galpao name (e.g., 'CWB', 'SP', or any future name)
The relevance check (which pills to show) uses estoquesPorGalpao data when available
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read pedido-card.tsx carefully. The hardcoded CWB/SP logic is in: cwbAtendeTudo(), spAtendeTudo(), decisaoIsAvailable(), getRelevantLocation(), and the JSX rendering. Add a new code path that uses estoquesPorGalpao when present, keeping the old path as fallback.

userStories.title: Frontend — Decision logic uses dynamic galpao data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want decisaoIsAvailable and decision dropdown labels to use dynamic galpao data.
acceptanceCriteria: In pedido-card.tsx, decisaoIsAvailable() checks dynamically when estoquesPorGalpao is available: propria = origin galpao atende all items, transferencia = any OTHER galpao atende all items
Decision dropdown label for transferencia shows actual target galpao name (e.g., 'Transferencia SP') not hardcoded
getRelevantLocation() uses origin galpao from estoquesPorGalpao when available
Falls back to existing CWB/SP logic when estoquesPorGalpao is not available
No 'as "CWB" | "SP"' type casts in the new code path
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The origin galpao is determined by pedido.empresaOrigemId → find which galpao that empresa belongs to. In estoquesPorGalpao, match by galpaoId. The 'best alternative' galpao for transferencia is the non-origin galpao that atende the most items.

userStories.title: API — Stock adjustment endpoint uses galpaoId
userStories.description: As a developer, I want /api/tiny/stock/ajustar to receive galpao_id UUID instead of galpao string.
acceptanceCriteria: In the stock adjustment endpoint (find it under src/app/api/tiny/stock/), accept galpao_id (UUID) instead of or in addition to galpao ('CWB'|'SP')
Resolve empresa and Tiny token internally: query siso_empresas WHERE galpao_id = param, then get token via siso_tiny_connections
If galpao_id is provided, use it. If old galpao string is provided, look up the galpao by name for backwards compat
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Find the stock adjustment endpoint. It may be at src/app/api/tiny/stock/ajustar/route.ts or similar. The key change is accepting UUID and resolving empresa/token from it.

userStories.title: Frontend — SISO dashboard filters by status_unificado
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the SISO dashboard (src/app/siso/page.tsx) to filter using status_unificado instead of the old status field.
acceptanceCriteria: SISO page fetches with ?status_unificado= instead of ?status=
Pendente tab: status_unificado=pendente
Concluidos tab: shows manually-approved pedidos (tipoResolucao=manual) with status_unificado in aguardando_nf, aguardando_separacao, em_separacao, separado, embalado
Auto tab: shows pedidos with tipoResolucao=auto regardless of current status_unificado
Tab counts update correctly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/app/siso/page.tsx and the filter functions in src/lib/filtrar-pedidos.ts. The Concluidos and Auto tabs may need client-side filtering on tipoResolucao after fetching a broader set.

userStories.title: Frontend — Worker error feedback in SISO dashboard
userStories.description: As a developer, I want operators to see when orders are stuck executing or have errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Orders with statusUnificado=erro appear in the Pendente tab with a red error badge showing the error message
Error badge is clickable and shows full error text in an expanded section
Orders with statusUnificado=executando for more than 2 minutes show an amber 'Executando...' badge with elapsed time
The 2-minute check uses criadoEm or processadoEm timestamp compared to current time
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The erro and executando orders should appear mixed into the Pendente tab, not in a separate tab. Use the pedido's erro field for the error message. For stuck detection, compare Date.now() with the processadoEm timestamp.

userStories.title: UI — Separacao page uses AppShell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Separacao page to use AppShell like all other pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Find or create AppShell component that other pages use for header/layout
Replace manual header markup in src/app/separacao/page.tsx with AppShell
AppShell supports headerRight prop for extra elements (user badge, logout) that Separacao needs
max-w-5xl is preserved (Separacao uses wider layout)
Header matches visual pattern of other pages (Compras, Configuracoes, Monitoramento)
No visual regression in the separacao page
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check if AppShell already exists in src/components/. If not, extract the common header pattern from other pages and create it. Separacao needs max-w-5xl while others use max-w-3xl, so AppShell needs a maxWidth prop or similar.

userStories.title: UI — Login page uses design tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the login page to use CSS variable-based design tokens instead of hardcoded zinc classes.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/login/page.tsx, replace all border-zinc-200 with border-line, bg-zinc-50 with bg-surface, bg-zinc-100 with bg-paper, text-zinc-700 with text-ink, text-zinc-500 with text-ink-muted, and similar semantic token classes
Verify that the design token CSS variables exist in the global stylesheet (globals.css or similar). If they don't exist, create them with values matching the current zinc palette
Login page renders identically in light mode after the change
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check globals.css or tailwind config for existing design tokens. If tokens like bg-surface, text-ink etc don't exist yet, define them as CSS custom properties and add to Tailwind config.

userStories.title: Performance — Embalagem fetches only selected pedidos
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the embalagem page to fetch only the selected pedidos, not all separado orders.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/separacao/embalagem/page.tsx, pass pedido_ids as query parameter to the API instead of fetching all separado orders
The API (src/app/api/separacao/ or dedicated endpoint) accepts pedido_ids filter and returns only those orders
No full-table scan of all separado orders for embalagem
Embalagem page still works correctly (pedidos load, scan works, completion works)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read embalagem/page.tsx to understand how pedido_ids are passed (likely from URL search params or state). Then modify the fetch to pass them as query params.

userStories.title: UI — Rename platform to Gestao de Pedidos
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the platform name distinct from the SISO module name.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/layout.tsx, metadata title changed from 'SISO Platform' to 'Gestao de Pedidos'
Home page (src/app/page.tsx) header shows 'Gestao de Pedidos' as platform name
The SISO module card keeps title 'SISO' with subtitle 'Separacao Inteligente de Ordens'
src/app/siso/page.tsx header keeps 'SISO' as module name
Browser tab shows 'Gestao de Pedidos' on home, 'SISO' on the module page
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Simple text changes across layout.tsx, page.tsx, and siso/page.tsx.

userStories.title: UI — Monitoring shows empresa_nome instead of filial
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the monitoring page to show empresa name instead of the deprecated filial field.
acceptanceCriteria: In the monitoring types, replace filial: string | null with empresaNome: string | null
In src/app/api/monitoring/route.ts, join siso_empresas to resolve empresa name instead of using filial
Monitoring UI renders empresa name badge instead of filial badge
No references to filial in monitoring code
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The monitoring types may be inline in monitoramento/page.tsx or in types/index.ts. Check both.

userStories.title: Cleanup — Standardize refresh intervals
userStories.description: As a developer, I want consistent auto-refresh intervals defined as named constants.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update src/lib/constants.ts with named constants: REFRESH_INTERVAL_LIST = 30000 (for list pages), REFRESH_INTERVAL_ACTIVE = 10000 (for active workflow pages), REFRESH_INTERVAL_MONITORING = 30000
Add comments explaining the rationale for each interval
Update SISO page, Separacao page, Compras page to use REFRESH_INTERVAL_LIST
Update Checklist and Embalagem pages to use REFRESH_INTERVAL_ACTIVE
Update Monitoramento to use REFRESH_INTERVAL_MONITORING
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Search for refetchInterval across all page files to find current values and update them to use the constants.
